rationale: PR title says 'Budget Strategy Lab: remove Regular categories, align column headers' and the diff in src/components/BudgetCommandCenter.jsx does exactly that: deletes the inner div containing the '▾ Regular categories' label and reshapes the header grid (adds columnGap: 32, drops font from 20 to 12, adds letterSpacing/textTransform, adjusts marginBottom). The new Spent/Budget headers gain padding: '8px 10px' aligned with the value cells, matching the PR body's claim about aligning headers with numeric columns. Pure CSS/layout refactor on a single JSX file, no logic or tests touched, exactly matches the stated goal.
